user_devices_device_type_check.name: user_devices_device_type_check
user_devices_device_type_check.value: device_type IS NULL OR device_type IN ('desktop', 'mobile', 'tablet', 'cli')

error_events_context_check.name: error_events_context_check
error_events_context_check.value: context IS NULL OR context IN ('server', 'client', 'edge')

licenses_perpetual_user_tier_unique.name: licenses_perpetual_user_tier_unique
licenses_perpetual_user_tier_unique.where: perpetual = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
